title: thelypteris cutiataensis
intro: Thelypteris cutiataensis, also known as the Cuti fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. It is native to Southeast Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is known for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of fever, respiratory issues, and skin conditions, providing health benefits such as reduced inflammation and improved immune function. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Thelypteris cutiataensis can be used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to treat various ailments.
